WORKSMART-AI

Specialist AI training and consultancy for higher education.

We specialise in supporting staff, students and senior leaders within HE to build confidence, capability and compliance with AI. We help people make the right decisions when it comes to AI by recognising the opportunities as well as the risks.

We are people-focused, cutting through technical jargon and overcoming anxieties through a personalised, supportive approach that encourages engagement and long-term use.

View Our Services
Contact Us

Your result

Your institution could reclaim £0 this year, the equivalent of freeing up 0 full-time staff. That's the gap between unstructured AI use and a coordinated approach. We close it.

Turn the estimate into a practical institutional plan.

Book your AI Capability Check How we calculate this

“Students see AI skills as essential, but institutional support lags behind. While over two-thirds (68%) of students believe AI skills are essential to thrive in today’s world, fewer than half (48%) feel their teaching staff are helping them to develop these skills for their future careers.”

- HEPI / Kortext Student Generative AI Survey, 2026

Explore What We Offer

Services we offer include face-to-face and online training for staff, student AI skills for the workplace sessions, 1:1 senior and middle manager consultancy, and bespoke academic coaching sessions.

All of this is underpinned by a data-driven approach, ensuring digital transformation leads to measurable return on investment.

View Our Services Contact Us

“On average, people say AI has made them 33% more productive and saves them about 1.3 hours per day.”

- AI Collaboration Index 2025, Atlassian

How we help you succeed

A structured, people-first approach to confident and measurable AI adoption.

Free Initial Consultation

A collaborative discussion to understand your institution's goals and challenges and see where you are on your AI journey.

AI Literacy & Needs Analysis

A collaborative discussion to understand your institution's goals and challenges and see where you are on your AI journey.

Personalised Workshops

Choose four of our workshops for us to personalise and deliver. Expert-led, hands-on training sessions (F2F or online) tailored to your institution.

On-Demand Online Courses

On-demand access to asynchronous courses that reinforce and extend the learning from our live workshops, for up to 100 staff per package.

Strategic Roadmap Session

A high-level session with your leadership to translate training insights into a clear action plan for sustaining momentum.

Ongoing Support

Continuous access to resources and our AI Cafe drop-in sessions to keep momentum strong as AI evolves. Follow up calls with SLT.

Book a Call
